allow: PowerShell(python show_db.py > data_dump.txt 2>&1; Get-Content data_dump.txt -Encoding UTF8)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $c=\(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:5000 -UseBasicParsing\).Content; "Status: 200"; "Has freeze: $\($c -match 'freeze'\)"; "Has streak: $\($c -match 'streakNum'\)"; "Has XP: $\($c -match 'xpNum'\)"; "Has DB icon: $\($c -match 'fa-database'\)")
